feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Destiny Shivers
entry.summary:
Author: Chaotic_Thirst_Goblin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 800Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin knows better than anyone that Arthur belongs to Albion, legends, and a future already written prophecy and secrets. But he takes every moment as they come, and he and Arthur form a bond, and find love that might just change their destiny after all. This collection of 100-word drabbles will share tales about about magic, kisses, devotion, destiny, and the precarious experience of loving someone history thinks it's already claimed. For the Come What May challenge on Tumblr.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Drabbles
  • some will eventually be mature
  • 100 words each exactly
  • some are AU and some are canon compliant

entry.title: No longer you
entry.summary:
Author: Rising_moon012

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 313Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Soulmates can be the earth's best gift to those willing to accept them. Fate chooses the perfect person for you to share your life with, and offers them to you on a silver platter covered with gold leaves and jewels. She tells you exactly how to find them and who they are, and all you have to do is allow yourself to let them share that bond and gift with you: A handprint is left on you from the moment you're born. Only you can see it, showing you exactly where your one true love will touch you for the first time, and when that happens, it disappears. A kind promise of Fate, as most say. The legend prophesies a Kingdom where magic is shunned, but soulmates are sacred. Where a royal heir will become the once and future king with the help and protection of a young warlock meant for greatness and a prince who sees too much. The moment they meet, and the bond is formed, the legend begins. And nothing can, or will ever, change it. If you believe in Fate, that is.   OR Merlin and Arthur share a soulmate: Romeo Aster. (A merlin BBC rewrite with an original character in the middle)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Fibs and Potions.
entry.summary:
Author: Moss_Chomper

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,495Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Arthur investigates an old woman, a suspected sorceress.She spills a liquid on him. Claiming it's a love potion. (Although it's a lie.) The old woman says it's a curse.He will be unable to resist the one who he holds most dear... That becomes a problem when he's the crowned prince who holds a secret fondness for his servant, Merlin. His attachment to the servant is no secret. But no one, not even Merlin himself.Knows how deep the prince's feelings go. Merlin also has a secret.He was born with magic in a time where any magic is outlawed.He will be killed if he were found out. Both desperately try to hide a side of themselves from the other. Who breaks first?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Two Hearts, Bound by Fate
entry.summary:
Author: Encantus

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,229Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Merlin Emerson, a hybrid Labrador/Wolf Therian (or Shifter) leaves his small town in Texas and travels to New Haven, Connecticut to attend Wildwood Academy, one of the most prestigious colleges for Shifters in America. While there he quickly realizes that his destiny is about to catch up with him when he bumps into his mate, purely by accident. He's arrogant, rude, and rich, the exact opposite of Merlin. Oh, and he's a Cat. Merlin will find a depth in Arthur that he isn't expecting, but also something more: a home. Somewhere he truly belongs, where he can be himself. Is this what he was looking for all along? Is this going to last? He certainly hopes it's not some cruel joke of fate.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,543Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 54

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Scales and Ice
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,935Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 20

Summary: This is the Merlin/Heated Rivalry crossover no one asked for but I decided to write any way. Shane, Ilya, and Svetlana unexpectedly find themselves in Camelot. Will they find their way home? Do they decide to stay? And what does Morgana think about all of this?

entry.title: [Podfic] nice weather we're having
entry.summary:
Author: AnneException

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: 5 times they don’t acknowledge his magic, and one time they do. -- They both stared at each other for a long moment, silently daring the other to acknowledge what just happened. Merlin’s eyes glinting gold, the goblet stopping without him touching it—it was undeniable.There was no way Merlin could lie his way out of this.“...Wind is awfully strong today, sire.”Unfortunately, Merlin is stupid.“...Yes. Quite.”Fortunately, Arthur is too.Podfic of nice weather we're having by eliwithab.

entry.title: through the desert repenting
entry.summary:
Author: schweet_heart

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,000Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 74

Summary: He lets Merlin sleep, snoring faintly in the fast-fading darkness while Arthur keeps watch over him, thinking about all the things he would give up for Camelot and gladly—except for this. A companion piece to all our dead, unfinished selves and the body is not an apology, but can be read as a stand-alone.

entry.title: Merlin Goes to the Tavern
entry.summary:
Author: livinginthetheater

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,624Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 70

Summary: While Arthur painstakingly repeals the ban on magic, he lashes out at Merlin. The warlock, meanwhile, just found out his mother wants to move to Camelot, and asks for a raise. Refusing to hear him out, Arthur snaps, and accuses Merlin of spending all his money at the tavern. So Merlin decides to finally go.Or, how Merlin ends up a bartender at the Rising Sun while in a fight with Arthur

entry.summary:

entry.title: Yo ho and a bottle full rum
entry.summary:
Author: Theroundbartable

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,681Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 131

Summary: After over a thousand years of waiting, thinking he found Arthur again only to learn he'd been completely fooled several times, Merlin spends most of his time drunk at sea. The legend is fake, the story of Arthur has been distorted by time and the current King is a massive asshole. Merlin's life as the cheap pirate Dragoon, however, is disrupted when Sir Leon thinks he found him. The King's son, Arthur, named after the legendary King, might be the one.or - the pirate reincarnation au no one asked forReminder: no parts in this series are connected

entry.title: Take My Life (And Hold It Tight)
entry.summary:
Author: DollopheadedMerlin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,197Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 19

Summary: After Gaius dies at the hands of Agravaine in the events of The Secret Sharer, Merlin reveals his magic to Arthur as a last ditch effort to see if Destiny was truly on his side.What follows is a terrible series of revelations, dubious rituals, offensive job offers, and lots of not-quite secrets still to be revealed. A season 4 & 5 rewrite where everything is worse.

entry.title: Young Hearts, Run Free
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,640Chapters: 11/50Kudos: 194

Summary: The night before Arthur faces his uncle's wraith, Merlin gives him a sword, a favour, and—unexpectedly—his heart. What begins as comfort before battle becomes something neither can deny: a bond that burns gold in their chests and rewrites the prophecy itself. But Camelot is no place for love that defies a king's law. When the Questing Beast appears in the Forest Sauvage and Morgana's magic begins to wake, Arthur must choose between the prince Uther demands and the king Albion needs. Between fear and wonder. Between destiny and desire. Merlin and Arthur were once two sides of the same coin. Now they are becoming something far more dangerous: one heart, one destiny, and a love the land itself has begun to answer. Canon divergence (mostly). Fast spark, slow-burning consequences. Epic scope, intimate moments, awakened magic, and a love that changes everything.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,600Chapters: 176/?Kudos: 149

entry.title: Master of Time: Advisor of Kings
entry.summary:
Author: jaqtkd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,807Chapters: 2/11Kudos: 2

Summary: The 'Master of Time' Series: A group of stories about Merlin's life after 5x13 and how he comes to fully understand his Destiny and 'The Once and Future King' prophecies. Book 2: Many years have passed and Merlin is continuing to seek out his reincarnated friends and form friendships with their families whilst he eagerly awaits the most important re-birth of all. Much has changed but much remains the same. What role will Arthur play this time around and how can Merlin help? This story is non-linear and based on real, historical characters from the Ninth and Tenth Century so, enjoy the ride!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Assumes a past Merlin/Morgana relationship
  • very light slash
  • just dipping my toe in
  • Based on historical events
  • Historical Characters - Freeform
  • King Alfred - Freeform
  • King Edward the Elder
  • King Æthelstan
  • why did Æthelstan promise not to marry?
  • Name Soup
  • So many names starting with A E and Æ

entry.title: Destiny Unfold
entry.summary:
Author: chronic_pain_in_the_ass

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 134,061Chapters: 12/65Kudos: 124

Summary: No young man, no matter how great, or mystic can know his destiny. He cannot glimpse his part in the great story that is about to unfold. Like everyone, he must live and learn. And so, it will be for the young magic arriving at the gates of Camelot. A boy that will, in time, father the legend. His name: Merlin.OrA rewrite of Merlin if the writers weren’t cowards. A lot gayer, magic users aren’t the enemy in every single episode, and Uther is the actual villain of the story. Morgana is still a villain, but we have sympathy for her.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: Unarmoured
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 538,696Chapters: 100/102Kudos: 722

Summary: Arthur has always taken Merlin on every mission — unarmoured, untrained, endlessly reckless. It never used to matter. But lately, every danger feels sharper. Every close call lasts too long. And Merlin is starting to notice the way Arthur hovers… and how the prince’s worry is beginning to look a lot like something else. A slow-burn story about devotion disguised as duty, love revealed through quiet choices, and the people who become home when the world turns dangerous. Love wins — even when it has to fight for it. Written with a companion playlist (linked in the notes) :)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
